data.title: Gryphon Capital Income Trust Reports NTA of $2.0181 Per Unit
data.description:
The latest update is out from Gryphon Capital Income Trust ( (AU:GCI) ).

Gryphon Capital Income Trust announced its Net Tangible Asset (NTA) per unit as of March 12, 2025, which stands at $2.0181. This figure, although unaudited and approximate, provides stakeholders with an indication of the trust’s asset value, potentially impacting investor decisions and market perception.

More about Gryphon Capital Income Trust

Gryphon Capital Income Trust operates within the investment industry, focusing on providing income through investments in a diversified portfolio of fixed income assets. The company is listed on the Australian Securities Exchange under the ticker GCI.

data.title: Kyokuto Securities Announces Provisional Year-End Dividend
data.description:
Kyokuto Securities Co ( (JP:8706) ) has provided an announcement.

Kyokuto Securities Co., Ltd. announced a provisional decision to pay a year-end dividend of 60 yen per share for the fiscal year ending March 31, 2025, with a total annual dividend of 110 yen per share. This decision aligns with the company’s policy of distributing profits to shareholders based on a consolidated dividend payout ratio of 70% or a dividend on equity ratio of 2%, considering factors like equity capital level and performance trends.

More about Kyokuto Securities Co

Kyokuto Securities Co., Ltd is a company listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange, primarily engaged in the financial services industry. The company focuses on providing securities and investment services, with a commitment to enhancing shareholder value through strategic profit distribution.

Learn more about 8706 stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.description:

Standard Chartered PLC has announced the release and vesting of shares under its share plans for two of its executives, Alvaro Garrido and Benjamin Hung. The transactions, which took place on the London Stock Exchange, involve the release of upfront shares and the vesting of deferred shares, reflecting the company’s ongoing commitment to rewarding its leadership team and aligning their interests with those of shareholders.

data.title: Aeris Resources Appoints Dane Van Heerden as New CFO
data.description:
An announcement from Aeris Resources Limited ( (AU:AIS) ) is now available.

Aeris Resources Limited has appointed Ms. Dane Van Heerden as the new Chief Financial Officer, following her role as Acting CFO since August 2024. With over a decade of experience at Aeris, her leadership and financial expertise are expected to positively impact the company’s strategic and financial outcomes. The appointment comes as Mr. Rob Brainsbury, the former CFO, remains on extended leave and will transition to a new role upon his return.

More about Aeris Resources Limited

Aeris Resources is a mid-tier producer of base and precious metals, with a focus on copper. The company operates two assets, maintains a mine, and is involved in a long-life development project and exploration. Aeris is committed to growth through organic projects, exploration, and strategic mergers and acquisitions, supported by a skilled board and management team.

data.title: Elixir Energy Secures $7 Million in Share Placement, Launches SPP
data.description:
Elixir Energy Limited ( (AU:EXR) ) has issued an announcement.

Elixir Energy Limited has announced a successful placement of 199.5 million shares to raise $7 million, with additional options issued to investors. The company is also offering an SPP to eligible shareholders to raise up to $2 million, with funds primarily allocated for drilling an appraisal well in ATP 2056. This strategic move aims to bolster the company’s operational capabilities and enhance its market position in the energy sector.

More about Elixir Energy Limited

Elixir Energy Limited is an energy company listed on the Australian Securities Exchange (ASX: EXR). The company is involved in the exploration and development of energy resources, with a focus on drilling and appraisal activities.
